productDisplayName: Nike Men's Ss Wfc No Loo Gree T-Shirt
description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline and graphic print on chestFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean This green nike t-shirt is part of the nike Better World campaign, which is dedicated to serving the athlete and making a better world through sport. Flaunt your sporting spirit by slipping into this pure cotton tee and keep up the spirit of sportsmanship where a win or loss makes no big deal. Team it with jeans and sports shoes, or shorts and floaters for unparalleled sporty cool.
